footer.copyright: Malha Fundiária Ambiental. All rights reserved.

banner.text: Malha Fundiária Ambiental consolidates an integrated geospatial infrastructure for the organization and qualification of the Brazilian territorial structure. We connect complex land and environmental data to drive governance, technical analysis, and sustainable territory management nationwide.

abstract.title: Malha Fundiária Ambiental
abstract.text: The platform provides integrated territorial databases, allowing for the analysis of the land structure alongside environmental indicators. The system offers tools for visualizing rural perimeters, protected area overlaps, and land-use dynamics, promoting transparency and precision in Brazilian territorial management.

differential.title: Key Features
differential.p1: The platform provides integrated visualization of land and environmental data, facilitating compliance analysis and territorial management.
differential.p2: Users can compare different databases and extract precise information about the structure of the Brazilian territory.
differential.p3: All data are available for download, promoting transparency and free access to geospatial information.

abstract.title: About
abstract.p1: Malha Fundiária Ambiental is an initiative of the Image Processing and Geoprocessing Laboratory (Lapig) at the Federal University of Goiás (UFG). The project aims to consolidate and qualify information about Brazil's land and environmental structure, providing tools for territorial analysis and governance.
abstract.p2: The platform integrates data from various official sources, such as the Rural Environmental Registry (CAR), databases of Conservation Units, Indigenous Lands, and settlements, allowing for a systemic view of occupations and environmental restrictions in the national territory.

abstract.title: Help Center
abstract.text: Find tutorials and answers to the main questions about how to navigate and make the most of Malha Fundiária Ambiental tools.

submit.success: Your message has been sent successfully

atlasinformation.title: Information Note
atlasinformation.text:
Malha Fundiária Ambiental integrates various databases to provide a qualified view of the Brazilian territory. For questions or suggestions, please contact our technical team.

Malha Fundiária Ambiental Team
